Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 125 

PRVDR_STATE_CD 

LABEL: Provider State (FIPS) Code 

DESCRIPTION: The ANSI numeric state code for the provider’s billing, practice or service location. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_STATE_CD 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_STATE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): APR Location 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: https://www.census.gov/library/reference/code-lists/ansi.html
